hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.dart|*.swift|*.kt|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in */src/screens/*|*/src/components/*|*/lib/*|*/ios/*|*/android/*) echo 'REMINDER: UI / platform code edited. Verify on BOTH iOS and Android (at least one device each) before ship.' ;; esac; exit 0

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */.env|*/.env.*|*/GoogleService-Info.plist|*/google-services.json) echo 'BLOCKED: secrets / service config should not be edited by Claude. Ask the user to edit manually.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'fastlane'*|*'xcodebuild'*' archive'*|*'gradlew'*'bundleRelease'*|*'eas build'*|*'eas submit'*) echo 'BLOCKED: App build / submission must be done by CI, not by Claude.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push'*|*'git commit'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Git commit/push should be done by the SRE agent or a human.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
